package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
)

// scenario for sha256_sum_in_loop: `sha256.Sum256(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario637Positive(chunks [][]byte) uint32 {
	var total uint32
	for _, payload := range chunks {
		total += uint32(sha256.Sum256(payload)[0])
	}
	return total
}
